title: Raccoon Removal West Village | Best Pest Control NYC | $900-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in West Village, Manhattan. Safe, humane removal from historic brownstones & apartments. Licensed experts. Call for same-day service: $900-$4,000.
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in West Village, seeking shelter in the attics and chimneys of historic brownstones and pre-war buildings along tree-lined streets. Our specialized raccoon removal service protects your West Village property from structural damage, health hazards, and noise disturbances caused by these nocturnal invaders. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon removal tailored to the unique architecture of this beloved Manhattan neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience handling wildlife removal in West Village's distinctive historic buildings, understanding the delicate balance between preservation and pest control. Our licensed technicians use humane exclusion methods that comply with NYC regulations while protecting the architectural integrity of your charming West Village home.
localContext: West Village's mature trees along streets like Bedford, Grove, and Barrow provide ideal urban habitat for raccoons, while the neighborhood's iconic Federal and Greek Revival brownstones offer numerous entry points through aging rooflines and chimneys. The proximity to the Hudson River Park and the area's abundant restaurant scene create perfect conditions for raccoon populations to thrive in this historic district.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in West Village?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in West Village typically ranges from $900 to $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring sealing, and the complexity of accessing your brownstone's attic or chimney spaces. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in West Village brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in West Village due to the neighborhood's mature tree canopy, historic buildings with aging rooflines, and proximity to the Hudson River. Brownstone chimneys, attics, and roof spaces provide ideal denning sites, especially for mother raccoons seeking safe places to raise their young during spring and summer.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in NYC humane and legal?
faqs.answer: All our raccoon removal methods are completely humane and fully compliant with New York State and NYC wildlife regulations. We use exclusion techniques, one-way doors, and safe relocation practices that prioritize animal welfare while effectively resolving your raccoon problem. We never use inhumane traps or harmful methods.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my West Village property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency inspections throughout West Village and can typically begin removal within 24-48 hours of your call. The complete removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the situation, including humane removal, exclusion work, and securing all entry points to prevent future infestations.
